First, you need the source code. Either you download the source code of some of the official releases [http://sourceforge.net/projects/openlierox/files/ from SourceForge] or if you want to have the most recent code (recommended if you want to test something or want to develop on/with OpenLieroX), you can [[Obtaining OpenLieroX source from Git|fetch the source from Git]].

Then, the compilation itself:

* [[Compiling OpenLieroX on Linux]]
* [[Compiling OpenLieroX on Mac OS X]]
* [[Compiling OpenLieroX on Windows]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721114642/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Compile_OpenLieroX -->
